children.heading: Agency consultation and coordination
children.label: a Agency consultation and coordination
children.text: In carrying out this chapter, the Secretary shall, as necessary, consult with, cooperate with, and coordinate its activities with the activities of other Federal departments and agencies.

children.heading: Cooperative agreements; memoranda of understanding
children.label: b Cooperative agreements; memoranda of understanding

children.text: enter into cooperative agreements or contracts with Federal, State, and local government agencies, nongovernmental organizations, and other entities; and
execute such memoranda of understanding as are necessary to reflect the agreements.

children.heading: Federal agency facilities and personnel
children.label: c Federal agency facilities and personnel
children.text: Federal agencies may cooperate in carrying out scientific and other programs necessary to carry out this chapter, and may provide facilities and personnel, for the purpose of assisting the Council in carrying out its duties under this chapter.
